assessment_items.question_content:
The tape diagram below represents $100\%$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/36bfffe7a4d2a40e0aaabf5c911f4ff41b06c2ba)

**What percent is represented by the shaded area?**

[[☃ numeric-input 3]] $\%$
hints: The ratio of shaded pieces to total pieces is $\blueD1:5$.

Percent means per hundred.  

So, we need an equivalent ratio that will tell us how many pieces would be shaded out of $100$ total pieces.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/360533fe5e2b6cbd1504809930d707769328b17d)
$\blueD{20}:100= \blueD{20}$ per hundred $=\blueD{20}\%$
$\blueD{20}\%$ is represented by the shaded area.

assessment_items.question_content:
The tape diagram below represents $100\%$.

![A tape diagram with 10 equal sections, with 9 shaded and the rest unshaded. A bracket labeled 100 percent spans all 10 sections. A bracket labeled question mark spans the 9 shaded sections. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/601f4acde9f54196951179a100ebf672229829ca)

**What percent is represented by the shaded area?**

[[☃ numeric-input 3]] $\%$
hints: The ratio of shaded pieces to total pieces is $\blueD{9}:10$.

Percent means per hundred.  

So, we need an equivalent ratio that will tell us how many pieces would be shaded out of $100$ total pieces.

![9 shaded parts times 10 equals 90 shaded parts. 10 total parts times 10 equals 100 total parts. 9 to 10 is equivalent to 90 to 100.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e709bb080f540c32e2e7b7128b19c2913cfa5254)
$\blueD{90}:100= \blueD{90}$ per hundred $=\blueD{90}\%$

$\blueD{90}\%$ is represented by the shaded area.

![The original image with each section labeled 10 percent and the question mark replaced with 90 percent](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f25880f7a86b2da40859f211b0d90513d0fdb471)

assessment_items.question_content:
The tape diagram below represents $100\%$.

![A tape diagram with 5 equal sections, with 2 shaded and the rest unshaded. A bracket labeled 100 percent spans all 5 sections. A bracket labeled question mark spans the 2 shaded sections. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4332879eda09f434fbecf8be5d16d27d8295fa53)

**What percent is represented by the shaded area?**

[[☃ numeric-input 3]] $\%$
hints: The ratio of shaded pieces to total pieces is $\blueD{2}:5$.

Percent means per hundred.  

So, we need an equivalent ratio that will tell us how many pieces would be shaded out of $100$ total pieces.

![2 shaded parts times 20 equals 40 shaded parts. 5 total parts times 20 equals 100 total parts. 2 to 5 is equivalent to 40 to 100.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/22189689323542ea33cb2aa27529d6cc7dbdb2af)
$\blueD{40}:100= \blueD{40}$ per hundred $=\blueD{40}\%$

$\blueD{40}\%$ is represented by the shaded area.

![The original image with each section labeled 20 percent and the question mark replaced with 40 percent](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2fc3bee393f22f156f3eb7dfa1d3a43c14ed0fbd)

assessment_items.question_content:
The tape diagram below represents $100\%$.

![A tape diagram with 2 equal sections, with 1 shaded and the rest unshaded. A bracket labeled 100 percent spans all 2 sections. A bracket labeled question mark spans the 1 shaded section. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6fcc76ffbd4fee0a4d4dfcf1993508fad1fe82bf)

**What percent is represented by the shaded area?**

[[☃ numeric-input 3]] $\%$
hints: The ratio of shaded pieces to total pieces is $\blueD{1}:2$.

Percent means per hundred.  

So, we need an equivalent ratio that will tell us how many pieces would be shaded out of $100$ total pieces.

![1 shaded part times 50 equals 50 shaded parts. 2 total parts times 50 equals 100 total parts. 1 to 2 is equivalent to 50 to 100.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/43b08235d405c7b2ff956623e08dc751dcdd17c9)
$\blueD{50}:100= \blueD{50}$ per hundred $=\blueD{50}\%$

$\blueD{50}\%$ is represented by the shaded area.

![The original image with each section labeled 50 percent and the question mark replaced with 50 percent](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b2d3d62b010e0f2bcf9122b75423badc140bbb05)

assessment_items.question_content:
$100\%$ is shown on the following tape diagram.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c2473d594685eb450a0b1bab15c97d7825ba7052)

**What percent is represented by the entire tape diagram?**

[[☃ numeric-input 4]] $\%$
hints: The ratio of shaded pieces to total pieces is $\blueD1:3$.

We are told that the $\blueD1$ shaded piece represents $100\%$. 

So, we need an equivalent ratio that will tell us what the entire tape diagram represents when $\blueD1$ piece is $100\%$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ae4208cd05af72a5048cf8e8a0d068b65d738550)
$\blueD{300}\%$ is represented by the entire tape diagram.

assessment_items.question_content:
$100\%$ is shown on the following tape diagram.

![A tape diagram with 3 equal sections, with 2 shaded and the rest unshaded. A bracket labeled 100 percent spans the 2 shaded sections.  A bracket labeled question mark spans all 3 sections.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5ea0defd10fdf568701ee66ce996f9861d9d39eb)

**What percent is represented by the entire tape diagram?**

[[☃ numeric-input 3]] $\%$
hints: The ratio of shaded pieces to total pieces is $\blueD{2}:3$.

We are told that the $\blueD{2}$ shaded pieces represent $100\%$. 

So, we need an equivalent ratio that will tell us what the entire tape diagram represents when $\blueD{2}$ pieces equals $100\%$.

![2 shaded parts times 50 equals 100 shaded parts. 3 total parts times 50 equals 150 total parts. 2 to 3 is equivalent to 100 to 150.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a2b31e73201e8ad3fc9be771c45280d00ff80ef5)
$\blueD{150}:100= \blueD{150}$ per hundred $=\blueD{150}\%$

$\blueD{150}\%$ is represented by the entire tape diagram.

![The original image with each section labeled 50 percent and the question mark replaced with 150 percent](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7d3d4f7f1e11252bd9dd04103b3c741894396860)

assessment_items.question_content:
$100\%$ is shown on the following tape diagram.

![A tape diagram with 5 equal sections, with 4 shaded and the rest unshaded. A bracket labeled 100 percent spans the 4 shaded sections.  A bracket labeled question mark spans all 5 sections.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/89b61cd0cf1fbac2858841a934188072d2fb9159)

**What percent is represented by the entire tape diagram?**

[[☃ numeric-input 3]] $\%$
hints: The ratio of shaded pieces to total pieces is $\blueD{4}:5$.

We are told that the $\blueD{4}$ shaded pieces represent $100\%$. 

So, we need an equivalent ratio that will tell us what the entire tape diagram represents when $\blueD{4}$ pieces equals $100\%$.

![4 shaded parts times 25 equals 100 shaded parts. 5 total parts times 25 equals 125 total parts. 4 to 5 is equivalent to 100 to 125.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d2f56a17e29e505a6a9932ba3606f0a34e1a09ca)
$\blueD{125}:100= \blueD{125}$ per hundred $=\blueD{125}\%$

$\blueD{125}\%$ is represented by the entire tape diagram.

![The original image with each section labeled 25 percent and the question mark replaced with 125 percent](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/28ee06f8761d33c791802bdb92d89c0ac9db0a29)

assessment_items.question_content:
$100\%$ is shown on the following tape diagram.

![A tape diagram with 8 equal sections, with 5 shaded and the rest unshaded. A bracket labeled 100 percent spans the 5 shaded sections.  A bracket labeled question mark spans all 8 sections.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2f4749842267991904bdb83c946423ea7c2f90cd)

**What percent is represented by the entire tape diagram?**

[[☃ numeric-input 3]] $\%$
hints: The ratio of shaded pieces to total pieces is $\blueD{5}:8$.

We are told that the $\blueD{5}$ shaded pieces represent $100\%$. 

So, we need an equivalent ratio that will tell us what the entire tape diagram represents when $\blueD{5}$ pieces equals $100\%$.

![5 shaded parts times 20 equals 100 shaded parts. 8 total parts times 20 equals 160 total parts. 5 to 8 is equivalent to 100 to 160.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1825bea99de86a2e53a2b74e59b824f9fe79dbb6)
$\blueD{160}:100= \blueD{160}$ per hundred $=\blueD{160}\%$

![The original image with each section labeled 20 percent and the question mark replaced with 160 percent](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5146443e7cd5614e239f85dc5d53875fd6bde02b)
